name: Bria Mack Gets a Life
overview: Bria Mack, a 25-year-old Black woman, navigates adulthood in a predominantly white world, which is made all the more difficult, but also more tolerable, by Black Attack, her invisible hype girl.

trailers.title: Black Women in Comedy in Sasha Leigh Henry's and Kelly Fyffe-Marshall's BRIA MACK GETS A LIFE
